results.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    catalog.products.id AS product_id,
    catalog.products.name AS product_name,
    catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
    catalog.products
LEFT JOIN 
    catalog.brands ON catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    pr.id AS review_id,
    pr.rating,
    pr.title AS review_title,
    pr.body AS review_body,
    p.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews pr
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON pr.product_id = p.id

SELECT 
    s.id AS subscription_id,
    s.public_id AS subscription_public_id,
    s.user_id,
    s.status AS subscription_status,
    s.currency_code AS subscription_currency,
    s.quantity AS subscription_quantity,
    s.started_at AS subscription_started_at,
    s.ended_at AS subscription_ended_at,
    p.name AS plan_name
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id

SELECT 
    sales.orders.id AS order_id,
    sales.orders.order_number,
    sales.orders.placed_at,
    identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    identity.users ON sales.orders.user_id = identity.users.id
WHERE 
    sales.orders.placed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
LEFT JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
WHERE r.id IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscribers
FROM billing.subscriptions s
JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE s.status = 'active' AND p.name = 'Pro'

SELECT 
    sales.orders.currency_code, 
    SUM(sales.orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders
GROUP BY 
    sales.orders.currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT 
    p.id, 
    p.name, 
    AVG(pr.rating) AS average_rating
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE 
    pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
HAVING 
    AVG(pr.rating) > 4

SELECT DISTINCT o.user_id
FROM sales.orders o
WHERE o.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY o.user_id
HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3
results.error: invalid input value for enum order_status: "completed"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    geo.countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(sales.orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    geo.addresses ON sales.orders.shipping_address_id = geo.addresses.id
JOIN 
    geo.countries ON geo.addresses.country_id = geo.countries.id
GROUP BY 
    geo.countries.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id,
    p.name AS product_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    sales.order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_variant_id
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT i.email AS customer_email
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
JOIN sales.orders o ON p.order_id = o.id
JOIN identity.users i ON o.user_id = i.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.user_id) AS user_count
FROM geo.addresses a
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.iso2 = 'DE' AND (a.user_id IS NOT NULL)

SELECT 
    p.code AS plan_code, 
    COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE 
    s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY 
    p.code
ORDER BY 
    p.code

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(o.id) AS order_count
FROM 
    sales.orders o
WHERE 
    o.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)
ORDER BY 
    month DESC

SELECT 
    o.tenant_id, 
    SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders o
GROUP BY 
    o.tenant_id
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT 
    c.name AS category_name, 
    COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM 
    catalog.categories c
JOIN 
    catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.name
ORDER BY 
    product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders
WHERE currency_code = 'EUR'

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN o.cancelled_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END)::float / COUNT(*) AS cancellation_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders o

SELECT id, tenant_id, name, legal_name, domain, industry, employee_count, annual_revenue, currency_code, owner_user_id, phone, website, is_active, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
FROM crm.accounts
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    b.plans.name AS plan_name,
    AVG(sales.orders.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    billing.subscriptions ON sales.orders.user_id = billing.subscriptions.user_id
JOIN 
    billing.plans ON billing.subscriptions.plan_id = billing.plans.id
GROUP BY 
    b.plans.name

SELECT 
    status, 
    COUNT(*) AS paid_invoice_count
FROM 
    billing.invoices
WHERE 
    paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    status

SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_coupons_count
FROM pricing.coupons
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE status = 'successful'

FROM audit.audit_log
WHERE action = 'DELETE'

SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'canceled' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS marketing_blasts_sent
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE sent_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'goods-out'

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) AS leads_converted_to_customers
FROM crm.leads l
WHERE l.converted_account_id IS NOT NULL OR l.converted_contact_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_webhook_callbacks
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT 
    status AS delivery_state, 
    COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM 
    comms.notifications
GROUP BY 
    status

SELECT 
    action, 
    COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM 
    audit.audit_log
GROUP BY 
    action
ORDER BY 
    entry_count DESC

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month, 
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
    analytics.events
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs
WHERE status = 'failed'
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bounced_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::float, 0) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages

SELECT 
    billing.invoices.currency_code, 
    SUM(billing.invoices.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices
GROUP BY 
    billing.invoices.currency_code

SELECT 
    tenant_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities
WHERE 
    is_closed = FALSE
GROUP BY 
    tenant_id

SELECT 
    comms.notifications.id AS notification_id,
    identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
    comms.notifications
JOIN 
    identity.users ON comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT 
    opp.id AS opportunity_id,
    opp.name AS opportunity_name,
    pipe.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
    crm.opportunities AS opp
JOIN 
    crm.pipelines AS pipe ON opp.pipeline_id = pipe.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT c.id, c.code
FROM pricing.coupons c
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
WHERE cr.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    p.code AS coupon_code, 
    SUM(cr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM 
    pricing.coupons p
JOIN 
    pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON p.id = cr.coupon_id
GROUP BY 
    p.code
ORDER BY 
    total_redeemed_discount DESC

SELECT 
    csat.rated_agent_id AS agent_id, 
    AVG(csat.score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses csat
GROUP BY 
    csat.rated_agent_id
HAVING 
    AVG(csat.score) < 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    marketing.campaigns c
JOIN 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm ON c.id = cm.campaign_id
GROUP BY 
    c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id,
    p.name AS pipeline_name,
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id AND o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN le.direction = 'debit' THEN le.amount ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at)) AS running_total_debits
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries le
WHERE
    le.direction = 'debit'
GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month
results.error: column "le.direction" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function

results.pred_sql:
SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa.display_name, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.user_id
GROUP BY 
    sa.display_name

SELECT 
    inv_warehouses.name AS warehouse_name,
    COUNT(inv_stock_movements.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM 
    inventory.stock_movements AS inv_stock_movements
JOIN 
    inventory.stock_locations AS inv_stock_locations ON inv_stock_movements.stock_location_id = inv_stock_locations.id
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses AS inv_warehouses ON inv_stock_locations.warehouse_id = inv_warehouses.id
GROUP BY 
    inv_warehouses.name

SELECT DISTINCT comms.email_log.recipient_email
FROM comms.email_log
LEFT JOIN sales.orders ON comms.email_log.user_id = sales.orders.user_id
WHERE comms.email_log.opened_at IS NOT NULL
  AND sales.orders.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    p.code AS plan_code,
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices i
JOIN 
    billing.subscriptions s ON i.subscription_id = s.id
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE 
    i.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY 
    p.code

SELECT
    geo.countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(sales.return_items.refund_amount) AS total_refunded_amount
FROM
    sales.return_items
JOIN
    sales.returns ON sales.return_items.return_id = sales.returns.id
JOIN
    sales.orders ON sales.returns.order_id = sales.orders.id
JOIN
    geo.addresses ON sales.orders.shipping_address_id = geo.addresses.id
JOIN
    geo.countries ON geo.addresses.country_id = geo.countries.id
GROUP BY
    geo.countries.name
ORDER BY
    total_refunded_amount DESC

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT i.email
FROM billing.subscriptions AS s
JOIN identity.users AS i ON s.user_id = i.id
JOIN support.tickets AS t ON s.user_id = t.requester_user_id
JOIN billing.plans AS p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE s.status = 'active'
  AND p.code = 'enterprise'
  AND i.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE status = 'abandoned'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS delivered_fulfillments_count
FROM sales.fulfillments
WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_product_variants_count
FROM catalog.product_variants
WHERE is_active = TRUE AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(po.id) AS fully_received_count
FROM inventory.purchase_orders po
JOIN inventory.purchase_order_lines pol ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
GROUP BY po.id
HAVING SUM(pol.quantity_ordered) = SUM(pol.quantity_received)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_sign_in_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS greenlit_returns_count
FROM sales.returns
WHERE status = 'approved'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_email_count
FROM comms.email_log
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_page_view_duration
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
    gateway, 
    SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
    billing.payments
WHERE 
    captured_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM occurred_at) AS event_hour, 
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
    analytics.events
GROUP BY 
    event_hour
ORDER BY 
    event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'sent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS success_fraction
FROM 
    comms.email_log
results.error: invalid input value for enum delivery_status: "sent"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    tm.ticket_id, 
    COUNT(tm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    support.ticket_messages tm
GROUP BY 
    tm.ticket_id
HAVING 
    COUNT(tm.id) >= 8

SELECT 
    order_id, 
    SUM(line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM 
    sales.order_items
GROUP BY 
    order_id
ORDER BY 
    total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
    sales.shipments.tracking_number, 
    sales.orders.order_number
FROM 
    sales.shipments
JOIN 
    sales.fulfillments ON sales.shipments.fulfillment_id = sales.fulfillments.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders ON sales.fulfillments.order_id = sales.orders.id
WHERE 
    sales.shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    crm.contacts.id AS contact_id,
    crm.contacts.first_name,
    crm.contacts.last_name,
    crm.accounts.name AS account_name
FROM 
    crm.contacts
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.accounts ON crm.contacts.account_id = crm.accounts.id

SELECT 
    pm.kind AS payment_method_kind, 
    COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM 
    billing.payments p
JOIN 
    billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE 
    p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY 
    pm.kind

SELECT 
    b.name AS brand_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
JOIN 
    catalog.product_variants pv ON oi.product_variant_id = pv.id
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON pv.product_id = p.id
JOIN 
    catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY 
    b.name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC

SELECT 
    inv_warehouses.name AS warehouse_name,
    COUNT(sales_fulfillments.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
    sales.fulfillments
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses AS inv_warehouses ON sales.fulfillments.warehouse_id = inv_warehouses.id
WHERE 
    sales.fulfillments.shipped_at IS NOT NULL OR sales.fulfillments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    inv_warehouses.name
ORDER BY 
    fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sales.orders.currency_code, 
    SUM(billing.payment_refunds.amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM 
    billing.payment_refunds
JOIN 
    billing.payments ON billing.payment_refunds.payment_id = billing.payments.id
JOIN 
    sales.orders ON billing.payments.order_id = sales.orders.id
WHERE 
    billing.payment_refunds.status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY 
    sales.orders.currency_code

SELECT 
    o.user_id,
    o.placed_at,
    o.grand_total,
    SUM(o.grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.placed_at) AS running_total
FROM 
    sales.orders o
WHERE 
    o.placed_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    o.user_id, o.placed_at
LIMIT 50

WITH monthly_order_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM
    sales.orders o
  GROUP BY
    DATE_TRUNC('month', o.created_at)
),
monthly_order_changes AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    order_count,
    LAG(order_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS previous_month_order_count
  FROM
    monthly_order_counts
)
SELECT
  month,
  order_count,
  (order_count - COALESCE(previous_month_order_count, 0)) AS change_from_previous_month
FROM
  monthly_order_changes
ORDER BY
  month

SELECT 
    crm.opportunities.owner_user_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS won_deals_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities
WHERE 
    crm.opportunities.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    crm.opportunities.owner_user_id
ORDER BY 
    won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) AS users_never_signed_in
FROM identity.users u
LEFT JOIN identity.login_attempts la ON u.id = la.user_id AND la.succeeded = TRUE
WHERE la.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id,
    p.name AS product_name,
    COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE 
    pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
